serviceNotes.engine oil: 550i N62: CBS oil service MFR 15,000 km / 12 months EU maximum (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: 550i V8: two air filters; replace every second engine oil service (2 × 15,000 km = 30,000 km) per garage.wiki E60 2007 table.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Eight plugs every third engine oil service (3 × 15,000 km = 45,000 km) per garage.wiki E60 2007 table.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 15,000 km / 12 months EU maximum (large petrol V8). https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e60/2007/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e60/2007/service-intervals.html — every 2 years; BMW owner's manual E60
serviceSources.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 30,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e60/2007/service-intervals.html — 550i V8 air filter with each second engine oil change
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 60,000 km to 45,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e60/2007/service-intervals.html — spark plugs with each third engine oil change (3 × 15,000 km)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
